qualifications.name: Diploma in Accountancy
notes: AS is calculated using Nelson Mandela University applicant-score rules: three fundamentals plus the next best subjects, Life Orientation excluded unless the official quintile bonus applies.
Alternative access: Higher Certificate in Accountancy or equivalent, completed in minimum time with more than 50% for all modules.
AS variants: Mathematics: 350 with 45%+; Technical Mathematics: 350 with 45%+; Mathematical Literacy: 365 with 65%+.
